verse.name: v1
verse.lines: People laugh when they see my mistakes And they doubt whether God lives inside In their eyes I may never be perfect But God's love looks beyond the outside

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Beauty is in the eyes of the beholder He sees me for who I really am All my sins, His precious blood just covers over I know beauty is in the eyes of the beholder.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In God's word it says, "Be ye perfect." And I know, in my flesh, I'll never be There are times all I see is my weakness But I'm so glad He sees His beauty in me.
